texto: I myself must also say I believe it is true that in the end humanitarianism will triumph
autor: only I fear that at the same time the world will be one big hospital and each person will be the other person's humane keeper.
explicacao: Orientação direta de only I fear that at the same time the world will be one big hospital and each person will be the other person's humane keeper. sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “I myself must also say I believe it is true that in the end humanitarianism will triumph” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, johann-wolfgang-von-goethe, italian-journey, útil em momentos de viagem e termino.
